summary: Continued bot-editor map: live execution is executor.py resolve_all -> evaluator.evaluate -> actions.execute against DB rules. Simulator uses POST /api/simulator/run with the same rule-walk logic (routers/simulator.py) and shows steps in SimulatorPanel. RuleEditor keeps simResults state for RuleLine highlighting but setSimResults is never called, so sim highlights in the rule list are unused unless wired later.
current_status: Familiarization complete; no code changes. Optional follow-up: connect simulator steps to RuleEditor setSimResults by line_number for inline hit/skipped display.
